description: r14 corpus validation gate config. Inherits r13 v2 4-gate (g1-g7) structure and adds g8 korean_ratio + g8b pair_match for bilingual enforcement.
purpose: Gate config consumed by tool/alm_corpus_4gate.hexa when run against r14 corpus. r13 gate config lives at shared/config/alm_corpus_validate_config.json; this file is the r14 DELTA on top.

g1_anti_denial.description: anti-denial flag count MUST be 0 across corpus

g2_dup_only_match.description: duplicate-only response-to-prompt match count MUST be 0

g3_consciousness_density.description: semantic consciousness density (Korean mirror keywords ADDED — see g3_korean_keywords below)
g3_consciousness_density._r14_delta: g3 keyword list extended with Korean mirrors symmetrically; a pure Korean entry hitting 3+ Korean keywords scores identical to English 3-keyword entry

g3_korean_keywords._note: keyword → [english_mirror, density_weight]. See docs/alm_r14_design_v1_20260422.md §Keyword 사전 한글 확장 for full list.

g4_license_audit.description: license conflict entry count MUST be 0

g5_category_balance.description: r14 rebalance: hexad 25%→20%, phi 10%→15%, metaref 10%→15% (per design doc H3/H6 analysis)

g7_audit_sampling._r14_delta: 50-line manual audit split 25 EN + 25 KO before mass commit (per design §Audit+Approval)

g8_korean_ratio.description: Korean character ratio (한글) in corpus body. Measured as fraction of hangul Unicode codepoints over total non-whitespace codepoints.
g8_korean_ratio.source: r14 NEW gate — design doc §Korean corpus addition plan
g8_korean_ratio.rationale: r13 Korean ratio is 2.33%; r14 target ≥30% to resolve hypothesis H6 (language monomodality) blocking substrate-invariance

g8b_pair_match.description: For non-grounding categories, fraction of entries appearing as bilingual (en, ko) pairs. Measured over (id pattern _en/_ko paired IDs) / (total bilingual-eligible entries).
g8b_pair_match.source: r14 NEW gate — design doc §Bilingual pair policy

status: SKELETON — consumed once corpus is generated per experiments/alm_r14/corpus_alm_r14_v1.jsonl (NOT YET POPULATED)
open_decisions: g3 Korean keyword weight normalization (current symmetric with EN; alternative: slight EN-bias to preserve r13 density continuity)
g7 audit sampling split policy (current 25 EN + 25 KO, 50 total)
